backend/main.mo: Main actor for the RAY INFOTECH MLM platform implementing user profile management, MLM tree/matrix logic, member registration, commission calculation, and role-based access control with admin/user permissions.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module defining old and new actor state shapes (userProfiles, members, nextMemberId) with a no-op `run` function that passes state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a fix to the admin role check in the delete member flow, referencing the affected frontend files and confirming high confidence via test REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'RAY INFOTECH MLM' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component configuring TanStack Router (routes: /, /login, /register, /dashboard, /admin), QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and an AppLayout that conditionally renders ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AddMemberForm.ts: Form component for registering a new MLM member with fields for name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID, including validation, sponsor lookup, and a success state displaying the assigned member ID.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Renders a 9-level MLM commission breakdown table showing members, rates, earned commissions, and max potential commissions per level, with locked/unlocked status indicators.
Displays a summary card of a member's total earned vs. potential earnings across all 9 MLM levels, including joining fee refund eligibility status.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright year and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop and mobile nav links for Home, Dashboard, Register Member, and Admin, plus login/logout controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual 3-ary tree of MLM downline members up to a configurable depth, showing member cards with name, ID, active status, and fee payment status.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Fetches all members and computes platform-wide stats (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) displayed as a grid of summary cards.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set up their profile (name and contact info) before using the MLM platform, shown only when no profile exists yet.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentDeadl: A card component that displays a member's 3-day recruitment deadline status (Met, Cancelled, or Active with live countdown) along with downline progress and join/deadline timestamps.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor (identity) changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including fetching/saving user profiles, listing/registering members, checking admin roles, and managing membership statuses and commissions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the Ray Infotech deep-navy-and-gold brand theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that lists all members in a searchable table with actions to mark joining fees paid, delete members, and view platform statistics. Also includes an add-member form and restricts access to admin-role users.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Member dashboard page that displays a selected member's downline tree across 9 levels via BFS traversal, calculates level-based commission earnings, and renders earnings summary, commission history, matrix visualization, and recruitment deadline components.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing/home page showcasing the platform's 9-level commission structure with feature highlights and a call-to-action for authenticated or unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that triggers Internet Identity authentication and redirects users to the admin panel or dashboard based on their role after login.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration page with a form for name, mobile, email, and sponsor ID that validates inputs, verifies the sponsor exists, submits registration, and displays the resulting member ID on success.
frontend/src/utils/deadlineHelpers.ts: Utility functions for working with nanosecond-precision backend timestamps, including formatting dates, computing a member's deadline status (Active/Met/Cancelled), and calculating time remaining until a deadline.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based semantic colors, brand-specific navy/gold palettes, shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a fix request to resolve an admin role check bug that incorrectly blocks authenticated admin users from deleting members.
